title: CMN Spore Core
description: Schema for spore.core.json — the core metadata file maintained in git repositories. This is the local draft that hypha release reads to produce the full spore.json manifest.

id.description: Filesystem-safe identifier. Cannot start with dot, cannot contain /\:*?"<>|, whitespace, or control characters.

key.description: Author's public key embedded at release time. Enables offline verification without fetching cmn.json.

synopsis.description: One-line summary — agent reads this alone and understands what the spore does

intent.description: Multi-paragraph description of this spore's functionality and purpose — what it does, how it works, why it exists. Each array item is a paragraph. Permanent, not cleared on release.

mutations.description: What changed relative to the spawned_from parent — describes the mutations applied to derive this spore from its ancestor.

updated_at_epoch_ms.description: Content update timestamp (milliseconds since Unix epoch). Recommended source: latest Git commit time for the source tree, with max file mtime as fallback.

spdx_expression_simple.description: SPDX license expression (basic pattern validation). Full SPDX parser validation is recommended.

relation.description: Relationship type. Predefined types: spawned_from, absorbed_from, depends_on, follows, implements, inspired_by, related_to. Custom types allowed.

id.description: Optional identifier for this bond. Bond-fetch command uses it as the directory name under .cmn/bonds/ (e.g. .cmn/bonds/strain-account/) instead of the hash.

reason.description: Optional explanation of why this bond exists and what role it plays. Most useful for depends_on, follows, implements, and absorbed_from relations. Typically omitted for spawned_from (use mutations field instead).

with.description: Bond-specific parameters whose schema is defined by the bonded spore's convention. Opaque to the CMN protocol.
